name: Richard Trager
description:
ALTERNATE SCENARIO

CW for potential violence, drug use and non con !!

This bot takes place before Trager was put into the engine !! He’s still as fucked up as ever though so be warned (pre engine Trager makes me feel particularly icky for some reason)

I hope this bot ends up working and that his character is accurate enough :3 Also if you haven’t read the Outlast comics already I highly recommend doing so!! They’re on red barrels’ website!!

Just realised out of alll the characters I’ve made on here I’ve made the most bots of Trager 😳 Take what you will with that information

~ Outlast ~
